name: chain_ph_launch_visdiff_stop_bridging_the_d
method: [PH LAUNCH] Visdiff: Stop bridging the design-to-code gap, close it

stages.task: Pull PH daily launches via playwright, filter design/dev tools, extract product URL + maker profiles
Score by upvotes (>50), comments (>10), category match (design/dev/no-code), find founder Twitter/email via LinkedIn scrape
Route qualified founders to cold_email_pipeline.py with template: 'saw your PH launch, we help [pain point] — here is one specific thing'
